---
name: Scorecard correction
about: Dispute or correct a fact in an MCP Security Scorecard
title: "scorecard correction · <slug>"
labels: ["scorecard-correction"]
---

<!--
Thanks for taking the time to flag this. Every scorecard carries a methodology
version, confidence level, and source citations precisely so disputes like this
can be made specific and resolved publicly.

Reviewers respond within seven calendar days. Disputes that change a verdict
are merged into the next methodology version with public version-history.

Please complete the sections below.
-->

## Which scorecard?

- **MCP slug:** `<slug>` (e.g. `github-mcp`, `playwright-mcp`)
- **Scorecard URL:** https://agents.aguidetocloud.com/scorecards/
- **Methodology version on the card you're disputing:** (visible at the top of the scorecard)
- **Last reviewed date on the card:** (also visible)

## What's wrong?

<!-- Be specific. Example:
"The dimension `secretsHandling` says 'leaky' but the server only ever passes the token via env, never logs it. See <link to source>."
-->

## Evidence

<!-- Sources we can verify. Code links, docs links, PR links, release notes,
     official statements. The more concrete, the faster we can update. -->

## What verdict change (if any) does this support?

<!-- Optional. If you think the dispute changes the band (ADOPT / ADOPT WITH LIMITS / REVIEW FIRST / DO NOT USE FOR SENSITIVE WORK), say which and why. -->

## Are you a maintainer of this MCP?

<!-- Optional. We don't gate disputes on this — anyone can flag a fact. But it
     helps us prioritise. -->

- [ ] Yes, I maintain this MCP
- [ ] I'm a user, not a maintainer
- [ ] Other (please describe)
